summary: 117 tests passed, 95.2% coverage, all quality gates passed

completion_promises.criterion_text: extract_insights tool registered at module level in __main__.py
completion_promises.evidence: extract_insights is decorated with @mcp.tool() at module level (line 38) in src/__main__.py. Test test_extract_insights_is_registered confirms importability.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Accepts parameters: transcript (str), focus_areas (str, comma-separated), video_id (str), max_insights (str)
completion_promises.evidence: Function signature on lines 39-43 accepts all four parameters with correct types and defaults: transcript: str, focus_areas: str = 'general', video_id: str = '', max_insights: str = '10'. Tests test_successful_extraction, test_multiple_comma_separated_focus_areas, test_video_id_passed_through, test_max_insights_string_conversion verify each parameter.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validates focus areas against known presets + 'all'
completion_promises.evidence: Lines 103-116 validate focus areas against FOCUS_PRESETS.keys() + ['all']. Tests test_invalid_focus_area_returns_structured_error and test_all_focus_area verify validation.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns structured error for invalid focus areas (INVALID_FOCUS_AREA)
completion_promises.evidence: Lines 107-116 return error dict with code 'INVALID_FOCUS_AREA' and category 'client_error'. Test test_invalid_focus_area_returns_structured_error asserts the exact error code and category.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns structured error for transcripts < 100 chars (TRANSCRIPT_TOO_SHORT)
completion_promises.evidence: Lines 119-126 return error with code 'TRANSCRIPT_TOO_SHORT' for transcripts under 100 chars. Tests test_transcript_too_short_returns_error, test_transcript_exactly_100_chars_passes, and test_transcript_99_chars_fails verify boundary behavior.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Converts max_insights from string to int (MCP string parameter pattern)
completion_promises.evidence: Lines 88-89 convert max_insights string to int via int(). Lines 90-98 handle ValueError/TypeError with structured error response. Test test_max_insights_string_conversion passes '5' and verifies result['max_insights'] == 5.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns extraction metadata dict from prepare_for_extraction
completion_promises.evidence: Lines 128-135 call prepare_for_extraction() and return its result dict. Test test_successful_extraction verifies all expected keys (extraction_prompt, focus_areas, categories, category_definitions, transcript_length, chunk_count, needs_chunking, max_insights) are present.

completion_promises.criterion_text: list_focus_areas tool registered at module level
completion_promises.evidence: list_focus_areas is decorated with @mcp.tool() at module level (line 148). Test test_list_focus_areas_is_registered confirms importability.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Returns all 6 presets with their categories and category definitions
completion_promises.evidence: Lines 165-175 return focus_areas dict with all 6 presets mapped to category lists, and category_definitions with all 24 entries. Tests test_contains_all_six_presets, test_each_preset_has_categories, test_contains_category_definitions verify completeness.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Both tools have comprehensive docstrings for Claude tool discovery
completion_promises.evidence: extract_insights has a 40-line docstring (lines 45-86) covering all parameters, return values, and usage. list_focus_areas has a 14-line docstring (lines 150-164). Both tests test_has_comprehensive_docstring verify docstring presence and content keywords.

All three error paths (INVALID_PARAMETER lines 92-98, INVALID_FOCUS_AREA lines 107-116, TRANSCRIPT_TOO_SHORT lines 120-126) follow the exact pattern. Test test_error_response_structure verifies the error dict contains all three required keys.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Code passes ruff check and mypy
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check src/__main__.py returns 'All checks passed!' with zero violations. Code uses type hints throughout (dict[str, Any] return types, str parameter types).
